response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute architecture or leadership in distributed systems, and their C++ exposure appears limited to academic or minor projects.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects and build scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, Datadog)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience documented, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale distributed systems design
Lacks formal technical leadership roles mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as preferred
